layout.layout_rhythm: grove: medium density, medium-high formality. Forest-green canvas with cream type, classical Playfair serifs, and a single rust accent.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_x": "8vw", "pad_y": "6.5vh", "pad_quote_x": "calc(8vw * 1.1)", "pad_quote_y": "calc(6.5vh * 1.2)", "gap_lg": "4.5vh", "gap_md": "2.8vh", "gap_sm": "1.4vh", "rule_short": "36px"}

template_json_typography.style: transitional serif headlines + clean geometric sans body + technical mono; full Chinese serif/sans support

design_tokens_typography.style: transitional serif headlines + clean geometric sans body + technical mono; full Chinese serif/sans support

typography.typography_role: transitional serif headlines + clean geometric sans body + technical mono; full Chinese serif/sans support

design_intent_font_pairing: LXGW WenKai as the preferred CJK display face ahead of Noto Serif SC
LXGW WenKai and Playfair Display both sit at similar optical baselines
cjk_policy.known_degradation: The system's signature `<em>` italic-coral treatment is the hardest piece to translate: **Chinese has no italic concept** — slanted Han glyphs read as broken, not as emphasis. The current Grove CSS depends on the browser's default `<em>` styling (italic) plus a CSS color rule for the coral. In Chinese, the italic does nothing visually, so the emphasis collap

template_json_palette.description: deep forest green canvas with warm bone type and a single rust-red accent; alternate cream-paper mode for breathing room

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Playfair Display 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Serif Pro 与 思源宋体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Jost 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 JetBrains Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

paragraph_spacing:
var(--gap-md)" data-anim="fade-up" data-delay="2" > The landscape has shifted. Now we must decide where to stand.

An honest assessment of where the market is, and where the opportunity lies.

The Thesis
Core Insight 03
The Argument

The brands that will lead the next decade are not the ones with the best product. They are the ones with the deepest understanding.

03 / 12
The Evidence
Research · Insight 04
What We Found

Audiences have outgrown the stories being told about them

Three years of primary research across six markets revealed a consistent pattern: the gap between how brands communicate and how people actually live is widening.

  • Authenticity is valued over aspiration in all categories tested
  • Trust is earned through consistency, not campaigns
  • Communities form around shared values, not product features

var(--gap-md)" data-anim="fade-up" data-delay="2" > What we propose — and why we believe it will work

A practical framework built on the evidence, with clear priorities and measurable outcomes.

The Recommendation
Strategic Direction 10
The Path Forward

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: headlines (via `<em>`) and the quote body. Italic body paragraphs are not used. Underline is not used. Emphasis in body text is communicated by the `.accent` color utility (changes color to coral), not by italic or bold. ## Layout ### Canvas System The system targets a fluid viewport — each `.slid

italic.raw_value: brand book. Playfair Display at weight 400 (never bold) carries every headline, italicized in terracotta coral for accent emphasis as the signature move. Jost weight 300 carries every paragraph as the "good paper" body face. JetBrains Mono at weight 300 holds labels, kickers, and the thin chrome bar
